items.title: Logitech’s black G PRO 2 Lightspeed wireless gaming mouse hits $70 all-time low for Prime Day (53% off)
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, Amazon is offering Logitech’s G PRO 2 LIGHTSPEED wireless gaming mouse in black for $69.99 shipped. This is one of Logitech’s more popular gaming mice, typically selling for $140. Today’s deal takes $70 off and lands $20 below the previous all-time low we tracked last year. That makes this the best price we have seen for the black model to date, and it’s honestly an excellent deal on what is easily one of the most popular esports-focused mice out there.

items.title: This 6-in-1 Travel Adapter with built-in USB-C cable has you covered in ‘over 200 countries’ down at $25 low for Prime Day (50% off)
items.summary:
Baseus 70W Travel Adapter with Retractable USB-C Cable

Buy for $25 (Reg. $50)

Apply FJ32XZTR during checkout. Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This Baseus travel adapter has become a main part of my travel kit, and it’s been a solid addition. It supports Type C, A, G, and I plug types for use across more than 200 countries, and you also get an AC outlet, two USB-A ports, and an extra USB-C port alongside a built-in cable, so charging your phone, laptop, and other gear is much easier without packing a bunch of separate adapters.

items.title: Anker’s expanded SOLIX Prime Day Sale drops the 3,840Wh F3800 Plus power station to a new $1,985 low, more from $104
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day savings event that is in full swing, Anker SOLIX has launched its official complete Prime Day Sale lineup with increased discounts on power stations, bonus savings codes and FREE gifts. One of the biggest upsets during this sale is the 3,840Wh F3800 Plus Portable Power Station down at $1,985.50 shipped, after using the sitewide code USAFF5 at checkout. It’s dropping down from its new $2,499 MSRP since the brand made permanent price cuts in May (originally $4,799), which we’ve seen go as low as $2,199 since it hit the market in early 2025. Now, during this event, it’s not only starting off priced lower than ever, but with the bonus savings code you’re getting a combined $514 markdown off the new going rate ($2,814 off the original MSRP) for a new all-time low price. You can also find the alternate standard F3800 Portable Power Station down at a new all-time low of $1,519.05 shipped, after using the above code. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals while they last.
